steps.t: Tribute-piles can be found outside Gunnberg's lair, south of Zudrugund. Frithgeir has asked you to seek out Gunnberg's tribute-piles and destroy them.
Gunnberg's personal tribute-pile lies outside his home in a small mountain pass. Frithgeir has asked you to disturb Gunnberg's personal tribute-pile a…
Frithgeir is at Zudrugund, north of the giant-ruins. You should return to Frithgeir with news of Gunnberg's defeat.
